caption: The video concludes with an end screen that features a black background dotted with white stars, creating a space-like effect. At the top, the text "THANKS FOR WATCHING" is prominently displayed in large, bold white letters. Below this, there are three sections: on the left, a white rectangle labeled "PREVIOUS VIDEO," in the center, a white circle with the text "SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE VIDEOS," and on the right, another white rectangle labeled "MY SUGGESTION." At the bottom right corner, the website "SECUREAGENTMARKETING.COM" is written in white text. The scene remains static, encouraging viewers to engage further by watching more content or subscribing to the channel.
